'''Galacticorp Mines''' was a corporation that was bidding for the rights to [[Mining/Legends|mine]] [[Ore/Legends|ore]] from the [[Hyggin Mountains]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Seltos]] during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. They were negotiating with [[Sinya Deboora]], Seltos' [[Magister of Trade]].

==Appearances==
